message.content:
I don’t have the stable reference text here in this chat. To summarize it, please provide the text (paste it, upload a file, or share a link). If you want, you can also specify:

- Desired length: one short paragraph, 2–3 paragraphs, or bullet-point summary.
- Focus: main ideas, conclusions, key findings, or a high-level overview.
- Audience or tone: plain language for general readers, or more technical for experts.

Once you share the content, I’ll produce the summary promptly.
